title: Eve Puckett
compiled_truth: Eve Puckett is an Enron employee at [Enron](companies/enron). Over the corpus period (2000-01-07 to 2001-04-18), Eve Puckett sent 9 and received 185 emails, totalling 194 interactions. Top correspondents: [Judy Hernandez](people/judy-hernandez) (9), [Leslie Smith](people/leslie-smith) (6), [Albert Escamilla](people/albert-escamilla) (5), [Amber Ebow](people/amber-ebow) (5), [Brenna Neves](people/brenna-neves) (4).
